selfdriven.money · Payments Interface

Every payment rail. Every signed.

The Human Pay Interface brings together PayID, BPAY, BSB transfers, and international SWIFT wires in a single passkey-secured payments hub. Every outgoing payment creates a KERI interaction event — cryptographic proof that you authorised it.

← Bank Interface How It Works
Payment Rails

Four rails. One sovereign interface.

selfdriven.money supports Australia's full payments infrastructure — from real-time PayID to international wires — all accessible through a single passkey-authenticated interface.

Real-Time

PayID via NPP

Send and receive instantly via the New Payments Platform using your registered PayID — your email, mobile number, or KERI AID. Available 24/7, including weekends and public holidays.

Settlement: Immediate · 24/7/365 PayID: mark@selfdriven.foundation Network: New Payments Platform (NPP) Auth: WebAuthn passkey · ixn event
Next Day

BSB Transfer

Standard BSB and account number transfers via the Direct Entry network. Schedule for later, set recurring payments, or send now — all with passkey confirmation and KEL logging.

Settlement: Same or next business day BSB: 802-985 · selfdriven.money Network: BECS Direct Entry Auth: WebAuthn passkey · ixn event
Bill Payment

BPAY

Pay any BPAY biller in Australia using your biller code and reference number. Save billers for quick repeat payment. Schedule monthly payments automatically against your bills account.

Settlement: Same or next business day Cut-off: 5:00pm AEST for same-day Network: BPAY Auth: WebAuthn passkey · ixn event
International

SWIFT Wire

International transfers to over 200 countries via SWIFT. Transparent fee display, live exchange rate, reason coding, and ACDC-attested transfer authority for compliance documentation.

Settlement: T+1 to T+3 business days Cut-off: 2:00pm AEST Fee: $22.00 flat per transfer Auth: WebAuthn passkey · ixn event
Cryptographic Signing

Every payment is a signed event.

No payment leaves selfdriven.money without your explicit biometric authorisation. The signing chain is cryptographic, verifiable, and permanently recorded.

👁

Biometric Assertion

Your Face ID or Touch ID creates a FIDO2/WebAuthn assertion — bound to the specific payment details and the selfdriven.money origin.

🔗

KERI ixn Event

The assertion anchors a KERI interaction event containing the SHA-256 digest of the payment instruction. Permanently appended to your key event log.

✅

ACDC Receipt

Completed payments generate an ACDC payment receipt credential — independently verifiable proof that you authorised this specific transfer at this specific time.

selfdriven.money · Payments

Payments that prove themselves.

Join the selfdriven.money early access programme and experience the only Australian bank account where every payment comes with cryptographic proof of authorisation.
